stemHtml: With respect to an autopilot, what does the term "self-induced oscillation" refer to?

options.a: Manual flight control inputs exceeding structural limitations.
options.b: Abnormal pilot interaction with manual flight controls.
options.c: Aircraft vibration triggered by exceeding V<sub>MO</sub> or M<sub>MO</sub>.
options.d: Oscillation caused by erroneous autopilot systems.
